# GENEATCG — Gene Ting-Chun Kao

Personal website of Gene Ting-Chun Kao (pronounced 'genetic'), a computational geometry engineer and researcher.

## About

Gene works at the intersection of computational geometry, geometry processing, and computational design. He holds a Dr. sc. ETH Zurich (Doctor of Sciences) from ETH Zurich and currently works as a Senior Research & Development Engineer at Synopsys. His background spans academic research and production software engineering. He builds geometry tools, meshing algorithms, and computational design systems.

## Site sections

- Blog: /blog/ — technical posts on computational geometry, software, and personal writing
- Portfolio: /portfolio/ — selected projects in computational geometry, fabrication, and design
- Resume: /resume/ — work experience and education timeline
- Publications: /publications/ — academic papers and research
- Talks: /talks/ — conference talks and podcast appearances

## Geometry Toolbox series

A blog series explaining fundamental geometry concepts with derivations and C++ implementations.
- Barycentric Coordinates: /blog/barycentric-coordinates/

## Contact / profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/GeneKao
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kaogene
